# Functionв”‚еЉџиѓҢ
Any entity form of an item is immune to damage from cacti. Currently, this only works with vanilla, the [Copper Extension](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-extension), and [Simple Copper Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes) items.в”‚д»»дҢ•з‰©е“Ѓзљ„еҮ¦й«”еһ‹ж…‹зљ†е…Қз–«д»™дғғжҺЊзљ„е‚·е®іпәЊз›®е‰ҚеЏҒе°ҚеҺџз‰€д»ӨеЏЉ[йЉ…ж“өе±•](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-extension)е’Њ[з°Ұе–®зљ„йЉ…з®Ұ](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-copper-pipes)зљ„з‰©е“Ѓжњ‰ж•€гЂ‚
